cards.title: Balancing Work and Childcare This Summer
cards.body: With rising holiday childcare costs, parents face the annual summer challenge of juggling work and school-aged children. The Guardian invites readers to share how they're managing this demanding period.

cards.title: Surrogacy in the UK: Legal Challenges
cards.body: UK surrogacy law is struggling to keep pace with rising demand, pushing some parents toward riskier arrangements abroad. Experts urge ministers to update legislation to better protect intended parents and surrogates.

cards.title: Creating Meaningful Rituals for Daughters
cards.body: One parent describes creating a special high tea ritual with her 12-year-old daughter as a meaningful rite of passage. These moments help mark important developmental milestones in a child's life.

cards.title: Teen Girls and Social Media Self-Worth
cards.body: Sensitive teens face mounting pressure from social media and peer comparison, affecting their self-esteem. Advice columnist Eleanor Gordon-Smith suggests patience and understanding as their social world expands with time.

cards.title: Raising Teens for Healthy Relationships
cards.body: The best protection for teens isn't preventing dating but teaching them to recognize respect and set boundaries. Skills for choosing healthy relationships are essential life lessons parents can instill early.

cards.title: Picky Eater Labels Affect Child Eating
cards.body: Calling your child a "picky eater" may actually worsen picky eating habits through language framing. Small shifts in how parents talk about food can help kids become more confident eaters.

cards.title: Prince George Celebrates 13th Birthday
cards.body: Prince George turns 13 and will begin secondary school at Eton College this September. A new video shows the young prince enjoying coastal activities as he enters his teenage years.
